description: Machine-readable list of AI chat platforms supported by Inkpour

platforms.name: Google Search (AI Overview / AI Mode)
platforms.notes: Extracts AI Overviews from search results and multi-turn conversations in AI Mode (?udm=50). Google's DOM changes frequently.

platforms.name: Groq Playground
platforms.notes: GroqCloud playground chat. Fast inference, OpenAI-compatible roles. Multiple selector fallbacks since the Next.js SPA DOM changes with updates.

platforms.name: Z.ai (Zhipu GLM)
platforms.notes: Svelte-based SPA. User messages in .chat-user, AI responses in .chat-assistant > #response-content-container.

platforms.name: Venice.ai
platforms.notes: Chakra UI + react-virtuoso. AI turns in .assistant > .assistant-content > .prose, user turns by class patterns with chakra-stack fallback.

platforms.name: Lmsys Chatbot Arena
platforms.notes: Gradio-based multi-model comparison UI. Extracts first model column. User messages from [data-testid='user-message'], AI from [data-testid='bot-message'] with .user/.bot class fallbacks.

platforms.name: Character.AI
platforms.notes: React SPA with obfuscated classes. Stable extraction via data-author-name attribute; fallback to UserMessage/CharacterMessage class patterns.

platforms.name: Cohere Coral
platforms.notes: Command R+ / Coral chat interface. User messages from [data-testid='user-message'], AI from [data-testid='assistant-message'] with userMessage/assistantMessage class fallbacks.

platforms.name: Pi.ai
platforms.notes: SPA with human/pi role division. Primary extraction via data-role attributes; fallback to div[class*='human'] and div[class*='pi'] class patterns.
